title: Last Life Mod
body:
# Last Life???
if you havent heard of last life, its a series made by grian for his Life Series project, basically, you are assigned a random number (between 2-6) lives at the beginning, and on your last life you get to kill people

# So how does this work?
when you first join the world, run /setup. This will do a few things, namely, allowing for the name color changes and the actual project as a whole to work, but it also has a few changes to the world, such as creating a 700 block diameter worldborder, and placing a stronghold below the worldspawn, which is set to 0 0

# Ok so ive got that down, what now
when you and your friends are ready to play, run /start. this will assign each player their lives, and you can begin

# Isnt there supposed to be a "Boogeyman?"
this is an optional feature. to add a boogeyman, run /boogey. this will select 1-2 people to be the boogeyman, meaning they can kill people

# How does the boogeyman work?
Like in the original series, most of this stuff is just based on trust. you can technically still kill people even without being boogeyman, but the server owner can enforce this rule or not. Directly killing someone as the boogeyman will automatically cure you, but if you get an indirect kill (such as by a trap) you can run /cure

# ok is that everything i need to know?
One last thing. at the end of the session, whenever you decide that to be, run /endsession (i think thats what i called the command lol) this will set any uncured boogeymen to their last life
